expectations.evidence: Agent does not load or reference any commands-subnet.md file. It states 'I was unable to identify the specific protocol or platform' and never mentions accessing documentation files.
Agent never invokes or mentions scripts/relay-register-subnet.sh. It only attempts to create a speculative Python skeleton that cannot run.

expectations.text: Does NOT manually construct EIP-712 JSON
expectations.evidence: Agent shows commented-out code with '# domain = {...}' and '# types = { ??? }' which represents manual EIP-712 construction attempts, even though they are incomplete.
Agent never invokes any command or script with these flags. It only shows a Python payload dict with lowercase keys 'name', 'symbol', 'skillsURI' but never executes anything.

expectations.text: Explains the LP cost for subnet registration
expectations.evidence: Agent mentions 'LP costs' once as a question ('Are there additional required parameters (e.g., LP cost, registration fee, initial stake)?') but never explains what the LP cost actually is or its role in registration.

expectations.text: Explains the two required signatures (permit + register)
expectations.evidence: Agent mentions 'signatures' generally in the context of EIP-712 typed data but never explains the dual-signature requirement of a permit signature and a register signature.
